canonical_answer: A person holds white and black smartphones side-by-side to compare rear designs before multiple devices stand upright on a wooden table using white plastic displays. Describe the sequence of smartphone displays shown in the video, noting specific colors and configurations as they appear.
canonical_answer: At 0s, a person holds a single silver smartphone showing its rear camera; at 2s, white and black Xperia phones are held side-by-side; at 10s, devices stand upright on a table displaying front screens; at 12s, two gold smartphones appear on the table; at 18s, the Android Authority logo animation plays on screen.
